checks.detail: Student privacy and retention policy must cover local-first storage, retention, export/delete and no backfill.
Performance budget must cover initial load, seeded-bank lazy load, offline cache and mobile CPU.
Accessibility audit must include WCAG 2.1 AA screen-reader semantics.
Release checklist must cover smoke tests, rollback, cache bump, QA evidence and documentation.
Pilot readiness gate must stay green before release.
Phase 6 release readiness scripts must be wired.

failures.detail: Release checklist must cover smoke tests, rollback, cache bump, QA evidence and documentation.
